mapper.sql: va.id, va.student_id, va.alert_type, va.alert_level, va.target_type, va.target_id, va.title, va.content, va.expire_date, va.remaining_days, va.alert_status, va.handler_id, va.handler_name, va.handle_time, va.handle_remark, va.deleted, va.create_time, va.update_time, sp.student_no, sp.chinese_name, sp.english_name, sp.user_id, sp.email
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO visa_compliance_alert (student_id, alert_type, alert_level, target_type, target_id, title, content, expire_date, remaining_days, alert_status) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{alertType}, #{alertLevel}, #{targetType}, #{targetId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{expireDate}, #{remainingDays}, #{alertStatus})
mapper.update: UPDATE visa_compliance_alert SET alert_status = #{alertStatus}, handler_id = #{handlerId}, handler_name = #{handlerName}, handle_time = NOW(), handle_remark = #{handleRemark}, update_time = NOW() WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
mapper.select: SELECT FROM visa_compliance_alert va LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = va.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE va.id = #{id} AND va.deleted = 0
SELECT COUNT(1) FROM visa_compliance_alert va LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = va.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM visa_compliance_alert va LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = va.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0
ORDER BY FIELD(va.alert_status, 'OPEN', 'PROCESSING', 'RESOLVED', 'CLOSED'), va.remaining_days ASC, va.create_time DESC LIMIT #{query.offset}, #{query.limit}

SELECT FROM visa_compliance_alert va LEFT JOIN student_profile sp ON sp.id = va.student_id AND sp.deleted = 0 WHERE va.student_id = #{studentId} AND va.deleted = 0 ORDER BY va.create_time DESC, va.id DESC
SELECT * FROM student_profile WHERE deleted = 0 AND status = 1 AND student_status IN ('PRE_ADMITTED', 'ENROLLED', 'SUSPENDED')
